name: Net
doc: Represents a named electrical connection point. Fundamental building block for wiring components together. Multiple pins connected to the same Net are electrically equivalent.

name: Net.connect
doc: Connect pins, nets, or buses to this net. Equivalent to using the += operator. Merges nets that share a connection.

name: Net.disconnect
doc: Disconnect a pin from this net.

name: Net.get
doc: Get an existing Net by name from the default circuit.

name: Net.fetch
doc: Fetch an existing Net by name, or create it if it doesn't exist.

name: Net.is_attached
doc: Return True if a pin, net, or bus is attached to this net.

name: Net.merge_names
doc: Combine the names of merged nets into a single name.

name: Pin
doc: Represents an individual component pin. Connects to nets to form circuits. Supports & (serial), | (parallel), and * (copy) operators.

name: Pin.connect
doc: Connect this pin to nets, other pins, or buses.

name: Pin.is_connected
doc: Return True if this pin is connected to a net.

name: Pin.get_nets
doc: Return a list of nets this pin is connected to.

name: Part
signature: Part(lib=None, name=None, dest=NETLIST, tool=None, connections=None, part_defn=None, circuit=None, **attribs)
doc: Represents an electronic component. Instantiate with a library and part name. Access pins by name or number using bracket notation: part['A1'] or part[1].

name: Part.copy
doc: Make one or more copies of this part. Returns a list of Part objects.

name: Part.get_pins
doc: Get pins from this part by name, number, or attribute criteria.

name: Part.make_unit
doc: Create a named unit from a subset of the part's pins (for multi-unit parts like logic gates).

name: Part.is_connected
doc: Return True if any pin of this part is connected to a net.

name: Bus
doc: A collection of related nets (e.g., a data bus). Access individual nets with indexing: bus[0], bus[2:4]. Width is determined by args.

name: Bus.connect
doc: Connect pins, nets, or other buses to this bus (positionally matched).

name: Bus.insert
doc: Insert nets into the bus at the given index.

name: Bus.extend
doc: Extend the bus by appending additional nets or buses.

name: Circuit
doc: Central container for an entire SKiDL design. Manages parts, nets, and buses. By default, all parts and nets are added to the default_circuit singleton.

name: Circuit.ERC
doc: Run Electrical Rules Check on the circuit. Reports unconnected pins, conflicting drives, etc.

name: Circuit.generate_netlist
doc: Generate a netlist file from the circuit. Supports KiCad and other formats.

name: Circuit.generate_pcb
doc: Generate a PCB layout file from the circuit netlist.

name: Circuit.generate_schematic
doc: Generate a schematic file from the circuit.

name: Circuit.generate_svg
doc: Generate an SVG schematic preview of the circuit.

name: Circuit.reset
doc: Reset the circuit to an empty state, removing all parts, nets, and buses.

name: Circuit.add_parts
doc: Add one or more Part instances to this circuit.

name: Circuit.get_nets
doc: Return a list of all nets in the circuit.

name: Interface
doc: A named bundle of nets, buses, and pins. Used to create reusable sub-circuit interfaces. Inherits from dict. Buses are automatically expanded into indexed nets.

name: Interface.connect
doc: Connect this interface to another interface by matching named members.

name: SchLib
doc: Loads and manages a KiCad (or other format) component library. Access parts with bracket notation: lib['555'].

name: SchLib.get_parts
doc: Return parts from the library matching the given attribute criteria.

name: generate_netlist
doc: Generate a netlist from the default circuit. Equivalent to circuit.generate_netlist().

name: generate_pcb
doc: Generate a PCB layout file from the default circuit.

name: generate_schematic
doc: Generate a schematic from the default circuit.

name: generate_svg
doc: Generate an SVG schematic preview from the default circuit.

name: generate_xml
doc: Generate an XML netlist from the default circuit.

name: ERC
doc: Run Electrical Rules Check on the default circuit. Reports unconnected pins and drive conflicts.

name: erc_assert
doc: Assert an ERC condition. Used inside @package or @subcircuit functions to enforce design rules.

name: reset
doc: Reset the default circuit to an empty state. Call between designs to avoid net/part accumulation.

name: search
doc: Search for parts in all library search paths matching the given term. Returns matching part names.

name: show
doc: Display a part's pins and attributes from a library.

name: subcircuit
doc: Decorator that turns a function into a reusable sub-circuit. The function's parts and nets are added to the calling circuit's hierarchy.

name: no_files
doc: Prevent generate_* functions from writing output files. Useful for testing.

name: backup_parts
doc: Save a backup of all parts used in the circuit so the design can be reproduced without library access.

name: lib_search_paths
doc: Return or set the list of paths searched for component libraries.

name: footprint_search_paths
doc: Return or set the list of paths searched for footprint libraries.

name: netlist_to_skidl
doc: Convert an existing netlist file into equivalent SKiDL code.

name: tee
doc: Create a T-junction between nets in an interface — connects nets together at a branching point.

name: POWER
doc: Part class constant for power symbols (VCC, GND, etc.). Use as: Part('power', 'VCC', dest=TEMPLATE).

name: TEMPLATE
doc: dest=TEMPLATE creates a part template that is not added to the circuit. Use copy() on templates to instantiate.

name: NETLIST
doc: dest=NETLIST (default) adds the part directly to the circuit when instantiated.

name: Net.__iadd__
doc: Connect pins or nets using the += operator. Equivalent to net.connect(). Example: vcc += r1['A'], u1['VCC']

name: Part.__getitem__
doc: Access part pins by name or number. Returns a Pin or list of Pins. Supports slices and comma-separated names.
